title: Aegon’s Conquest: The Last Kingdom Falls #got #shorts
description: The final resistance against Aegon’s conquest brought kings together—but even united, they could not stand against dragons. This is the fall of the last kingdom. #ASOIAF #Dragons #Shorts

scenes.narration: When the last kings stood together, they believed unity could defeat dragons.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple kings and armies gathered together on battlefield, tense anticipation, dark fantasy cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: For the first time, the kingdoms united—combining their strength into one final stand.
scenes.image_prompt: massive unified army stretching across landscape, banners flying, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They had numbers, strategy, and hope that together, they could win.
scenes.image_prompt: soldiers preparing for battle with determination, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But Aegon did not face them with armies—he faced them with fire from the sky.
scenes.image_prompt: dragons emerging above battlefield casting massive shadows, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As the battle began, the ground shook—but the real destruction came from above.
scenes.image_prompt: dragonfire raining down across battlefield, chaos unfolding, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Three dragons attacked at once, turning the largest army in Westeros into chaos.
scenes.image_prompt: three dragons unleashing fire simultaneously across army, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Flames spread faster than commands, breaking formations and destroying any chance of resistance.
scenes.image_prompt: army collapsing under uncontrollable fire, soldiers scattering, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What was meant to be a final stand became a final defeat.
scenes.image_prompt: fallen banners and burning battlefield, aftermath of destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: After that battle, no kingdom could challenge Aegon’s power again.
scenes.image_prompt: map of Westeros with kingdoms dimming under dragon dominance, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because the last kingdom did not fall alone—it took the old world down with it.
scenes.image_prompt: burning battlefield fading into new era horizon, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
